lessonSubtitleText: Test how well you know this story

questions.text: What job did Darius give Daniel, and how did he do?
answers: He was a leader in the kingdom and did his work very well
He became a soldier and won many battles
He worked in the temple of Darius' god
He collected taxes, but kept the money for himself

questions.text: How did the other leaders feel about Daniel?
What law did the leaders convince Darius to make?
answers: People could only pray to the king for 30 days
No one could work for 30 days
People could only pray to Daniel for 30 days

questions.text: Why did the leaders want this law?
answers: To show Daniel that they hated him

questions.text: What did Daniel do after the law was signed?
answers: He kept praying to God three times a day
He prayed to King Darius instead of the Lord

questions.text: How did the king feel when he heard Daniel broke the law?
answers: He was upset and tried to save Daniel

questions.text: Why couldn’t the king save Daniel?
answers: Even the king was not allowed to change the laws

questions.text: How did Daniel survive in the lion’s den?
answers: God sent an angel to shut the lions’ mouths
God gave the lions a tummy ache

questions.text: What happened to the leaders who trapped Daniel?
answers: They were thrown into the lion’s den and eaten

questions.text: What new law did Darius make?
